stemHtml: What conditions must be met for the issue and continued validity of an AOC?

options.a: The operator must remain in compliance with all regulations and grant full access to the competent authority.
options.b: The original certificate must be surrendered and reissued following an authority inspection.
options.c: Any finding of non-compliance will automatically revoke the AOC.
options.d: The original certificate must be surrendered and reissued within 28 days of an authority inspection.
